name: Underworld Counting House
text:
When Underworld Counting House enters the battlefield, you create a Favor token, then you lose 1 life. Setup costs.
{T}: Add {B}.
{4}, {T}: Draw a card, then you lose 1 life. The lamp burns all night. The numbers never sleep. Neither do the goblins who guard them.
flavorText: Beneath the town, beneath the sewers, beneath even that, a goblin licks his thumb and turns a page.
